privileged_info_summary: The task successfully relies on synthetic data generated via Python mimicking OSF Pashler Replications with Ex-Gaussian distributions. I have explicitly verified that 20 standard participants and 1 contaminated participant (P99) are created, where P99 is injected with near-50% T1 accuracy and a flat RT2 curve across all specified SOAs (50, 150, 300, 500, 900). The expected output file path exactly matches /home/ga/pebl/analysis/prp_report.json.
